description: Every public row must have at least one traceable source URL.
Admission cutoff/merit value must be tied to an official or manually verified source row.
Placement evidence must identify denominator basis or carry a visible warning.
Fee/ROI scoring must be tied to a source or clearly marked fee-only provisional.
Median/base/average/highest salary basis must be known or warning must be visible.
Public rows must meet the minimum confidence threshold for v1.0.
Every public row must have a last-verified date or audit row.
Verifier must mark row ready before publish_default can be yes.
